summary: Global-Grade Live Features for Google Play Compliance - All tests passed. Live Mining Indicator displays mining status (Active/Paused). Live Transparency Panel shows platform-wide stats (Today PRC Earned, Today PRC Burned, Redeems Today, Active Users). /api/public/live-stats endpoint returns correct data structure. Quick View mode in Admin Accounting shows real ledger data. All translations working in Marathi/Hindi/English.
critical_code_review_comments: Live Mining Indicator correctly shows 'Mining Active • LIVE' or 'Mining Paused' based on user's mining_active status
Live Transparency Panel has proper data-testid='live-transparency-panel' for testing
Panel displays 4 stats: Today PRC Earned, Today PRC Burned, Redeems Today, Active Users
Compliance disclaimer 'PRC are reward points, not financial investment' is visible
Language switching works - translations available in Marathi (mr), Hindi (hi), English (en)
Admin Accounting Quick View shows real ledger data with Income/Expense breakdown
/api/public/live-stats is a public endpoint (no auth required) - Google Play compliant
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Live Features Phase 1 fully tested. User Dashboard at /dashboard shows Live Mining Indicator and Live Transparency Panel. Admin Accounting at /admin/accounting shows Quick View with real ledger data. Tutorial modal may appear for first-time users - set localStorage.setItem('tutorial_completed', 'true') to skip. Profile completion popup can be skipped with localStorage.setItem('profile_popup_skipped', Date.now().toString()).

TestLiveStatsAPI.test_live_stats_response_structure: PASSED - Has today_prc_earned, today_prc_burned, redeems_today, active_users, timestamp
TestLiveStatsAPI.test_live_stats_data_types: PASSED - All fields have correct types
TestLiveStatsAPI.test_live_stats_no_auth_required: PASSED - Public endpoint works without auth

TestMasterSummaryAPI.test_master_summary_structure: PASSED - Has income, expense, net_profit_loss, prc_stats

User_Dashboard_Live_Features.compliance_disclaimer: PASSED - 'PRC are reward points, not financial investment' visible

Admin_Accounting_Quick_View.prc_stats: PASSED - Shows Total PRC (1,11,828.62), INR Liability (₹11,182.86), Conversion Rate (1 INR = 10 PRC)

observations.google_play_compliance: All features compliant - shows reward points, not money amounts
